children.text: Sale of reserved mineral interests; disposition of proceeds
All proceeds from sales made under sections 1033 to 1039 of this title of mineral interests described in

children.tail: shall be covered into the Treasury of the United States as miscellaneous receipts, except that the proceeds from sales of mineral interests which were a part of or derived from the assets transferred pursuant to the transfer agreements with State rural rehabilitation corporations shall be credited to the appropriate corporation account.

children.text: Section was not enacted as part of the Bankhead-Jones Farm Tenant Act which constitutes a major part of this chapter.
